name: Limbs Formation Process
description: Limbs Formation Process in Animals. This process represents a higher-level biological mechanism distinct from molecular/biochemical processes covered in GLMP.
mermaid:
graph TD
    A14[Lateral Plate Mesoderm] --> B14[Limb Field Specification]
    B14 --> C14[Limb Bud Formation]
    C14 --> D14[Apical Ectodermal Ridge]
    D14 --> E14[Proliferation Zone]
    E14 --> F14[Proximo-Distal Patterning]
    F14 --> G14[Antero-Posterior Patterning]
    G14 --> H14[Digit Formation]
    H14 --> I14[Interdigital Apoptosis]
    I14 --> J14[Final Limb Structure]
    
    style A14 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style B14 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style C14 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style D14 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style E14 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style F14 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style G14 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style H14 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style I14 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style J14 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff

sources.title: Programming Framework: A Universal Process Visualization Methodology
sources.notes: Higher-level biological process visualization: Limbs Formation Process. Created using the Programming Framework methodology for organismal and ecological process analysis.

sources.title: Sonic hedgehog mediates the polarizing activity of the ZPA.
sources.authors: Riddle RD, Johnson RL, Laufer E, Tabin C.

sources.title: The FGF8 gene is required for normal mammalian limb development.
sources.authors: Boulet DM, Moon AM, Capecchi MR, Martin GR.

sources.title: Embryonic timing, axial patterning, and the evolution of the vertebrate limb.

notes: Higher-level biological process. GLMP covers biochemical/molecular processes; this database covers organismal/ecological processes.
